---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear one-line description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this address? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like it to work? Describe the UI/UX if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Platform
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] All platforms

## Additional Context
Any mockups, screenshots, or references to similar tools.

---

> **Before submitting:** Check that this doesn't require network access,
> custom cryptography, or new pip dependencies — those are outside scope.
> See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for ground rules.
